prompt: Which 3 analytics modules have the highest average user rating (with at least 5 ratings)? And which 3 modules have the lowest average rating (with at least 3 ratings)? For each, show the module name, average rating, and a sample review title.
output:
Top 3 modules by average rating (≥ 5 ratings):
1. Talent Retention Predictor — 5.0 — "Finally, data-driven forecasting"
2. Order Fulfilment Tracker — 4.67 — "Exceeded our accuracy targets"
3. Cash Flow Predictor — 4.6 — "Cut our analysis time by 80%"

Bottom 3 modules by average rating (≥ 3 ratings):
1. Transportation Network Optimizer — 3.0 — "Model needs more training data"
2. GTM Readiness Planner — 3.2 — "Data freshness issues"
3. Innovation Pipeline Dashboard — 3.33 — "Useful but needs calibration"
